title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!
